    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    D

    Darius - Class in NonGui.ListOfLeader
    Represents "Darius" Leader Card.
    Darius() - Constructor for class NonGui.ListOfLeader.Darius
    Constructs a new Darius Leader Card with Fighter class and challenge bonus ability.
    DarkSeal - Class in NonGui.ListOfCards.itemcard.CurseItem
    Represents the "Dark Seal" Item Card.
    DarkSeal() - Constructor for class NonGui.ListOfCards.itemcard.CurseItem.DarkSeal
    Constructs a new Dark Seal with its identity and curse effect text.
    deck - Static variable in class NonGui.GameLogic.GameEngine
     
    Deck - Class in NonGui.BaseEntity
    Represents the main deck and discard pile in the game.
    Deck() - Constructor for class NonGui.BaseEntity.Deck
    Initializes a new empty Deck and Discard Pile.
    DeckView - Class in gui
    Represents the graphical interface for viewing the game deck.
    DeckView() - Constructor for class gui.DeckView
    Constructs a new DeckView, initializing the scrollable grid and setting up listeners to reflect real-time changes from the GameEngine's deck.
    decreaseActionPoint(int) - Method in class NonGui.BaseEntity.Player
     
    Deny - Class in NonGui.ListOfCards.modifiercard
    Represents the "Deny" Modifier Card.
    Deny() - Constructor for class NonGui.ListOfCards.modifiercard.Deny
    Constructs a new Deny card with its identity and modifier values.
    DiceUtils - Class in NonGui.GameUtils
    Utility class for all dice-rolling mechanics in the game.
    DiceUtils() - Constructor for class NonGui.GameUtils.DiceUtils
     
    DiceView - Class in gui
    Handles the visual animation and display of dice rolls on the game board.
    DiceView() - Constructor for class gui.DiceView
     
    discardCard(BaseCard) - Method in class NonGui.BaseEntity.Deck
    Adds a card to the discard pile.
    drawCard() - Method in class NonGui.BaseEntity.Deck
    Shuffles the deck and draws the top card.
    drawCard(Player) - Static method in class NonGui.GameLogic.GameEngine
    Allows the current player to draw a random card from the deck.
    drawObjective() - Method in class NonGui.BaseEntity.ObjectiveDeck
    Shuffles the deck and draws the top objective.
    drawObjective() - Static method in class NonGui.GameUtils.GenerationsUtils
    Draws the top objective from the global Objective Deck.
    drawRandomCard() - Method in class NonGui.BaseEntity.Player
    Draws a random card from the main deck and adds it to the player's hand.
